alkylation reagent: alkylated (11 mM iodoacetamide; room temperature in the dark for 15 min)
alkylation concentration: alkylated (11 mM iodoacetamide; room temperature in the dark for 15 min)
cleavage agent: added at 1:50 trypsin-to-protein mass ratio for the first digestion overnight
fractionation method: separated by high-pH reversed-phase high-performance liquid chromatography (HPLC)
fragmentation method: analyzed using an EASY-nLC 1000 LC system (Thermo Fisher Scientific) coupled with an Orbitrap Fusion mass spectrometer (Thermo Fisher Scientific)
instrument: coupled with an Orbitrap Fusion mass spectrometer (Thermo Fisher Scientific)
labeling: peptides were labeled with TMTsixplex (Thermo Fisher Scientific)
